description: You are a fixed-income portfolio analyst at an institutional asset manager. Using the bond_portfolio.xlsx workbook, complete the 'Duration_Analysis' sheet for the 10 listed bonds. For each bond, calculate the Years to Maturity from the settlement date of 1/15/2024, Market Value (Par × Price/100), Macaulay Duration, Modified Duration, DV01 (Modified Duration × Market Value / 10000), and Convexity approximation. Mark any bond where Modified Duration exceeds 7.0 years with the flag 'DURATION_BREACH'. In the Portfolio Totals section, determine the market-value-weighted average Modified Duration, total portfolio DV01, and total portfolio market value. On the 'Shock_Scenario' sheet, calculate the P&L impact for each bond and the portfolio totals under +100bps, -100bps, and +50bps parallel rate shocks (P&L = -1 × Modified Duration × shock_in_decimal × Market Value). Save the completed workbook to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ExcelTasks\bond_portfolio.xlsx.

metadata.data_source: Treasury YTMs from US Treasury par yield curve Jan 15 2024 (2yr=4.37%, 10yr=4.05%, 30yr=4.27%); corporate spreads from ICE BofA BAMLC0A0CM OAS ~93bps Jan 2024; muni yields from MSRB EMMA ~3.0-3.2% AAA 10yr Jan 2024
